title: Insufficient Volume — EDTA Tube
content: When an EDTA specimen arrives with volume below the minimum required for the ordered test, the specimen cannot be processed as received. Disposition: retest_required. Contact the collection site to arrange recollection using a full-draw EDTA tube. Do not attempt to process a partial-draw specimen, as anticoagulant-to-blood ratio errors invalidate downstream results. If volume is only marginally below threshold (within 10%) and the test is time-critical, escalate to the lab director for a case-by-case waiver.
